staticFirstPolicy.summary: All core city, boundary, TOP100, and household data must be bundled as static assets. No live data service is required for the app experience.

approvedSources.name: 국토교통부_일별법정구역정보 SHP
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; never client runtime fetch
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: 공공데이터포털 page lists 무료 and 이용허락범위 제한 없음; verify and preserve snapshot-specific metadata when derived geometry is committed.

approvedSources.name: VWorld 법정경계 SHP download surfaces
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; simplify before bundling
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: Use only when the selected dataset's current license permits bundled derived visualization with attribution.

approvedSources.name: southkorea/southkorea-maps KOSTAT 2013 simplified GeoJSON
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; never client runtime fetch
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: README states KOSTAT source data is free to share or remix; keep static attribution and decorative-only disclaimer.

decorativeIslandReferencePolicy.reason: Product decision: no separate decorative island markers or labels are rendered. Jeju remains represented only by the 제주특별자치도 administrative polygon; Ulleungdo and Dokdo are omitted from the family navigation overlay to keep the premium map uncluttered.

capitals.inclusionRule: UN-member-states-only: exactly the 193 current United Nations Member States; territories, observer states, dependencies, and non-member states are excluded. One primary/listed capital marker per included member state.

officialMemberStateSource.name: Member States | United Nations
officialMemberStateSource.retrievalPolicy: build-time static inclusion check; no client runtime query
officialMemberStateSource.licenseUsageNote: Used as factual source for current UN Member State inclusion/count semantics.

coordinateSource.name: country-capital-lat-long-population.csv
coordinateSource.retrievalPolicy: build-time snapshot only; no client runtime query
coordinateSource.licenseUsageNote: Used only for capital display coordinates and capital labels; verify static metadata before refreshing.

removedNonMemberEntries.reason: Holy See/Vatican City is not a UN Member State and is excluded from exact-193 UN member-state capital mode.

top100Cities.metric: international arrivals by city, 2017 current ranking
top100Cities.fallbackDecision: Use the complete public Euromonitor Top 100 City Destinations 2018 white paper for exact-100 static rows. Mastercard GDCI 2019 remains a top-20-only corroborating source and must not be used to infer ranks 21-100.

approvedSources.name: Euromonitor Top 100 City Destinations 2018
approvedSources.retrievalPolicy: build-time static transcription with source metadata; no runtime dependency
approvedSources.licenseUsageNote: Public white paper ranking used as factual source for the exact-100 static city list; do not bundle report prose or imagery.

rejectedSources.reason: Public Agoda materials are partial/promotional and do not provide a legally complete global top-100 dataset for this static app.
Public Mastercard GDCI 2019 report exposes top-20 detail only, so it cannot validate exact ranks 21-100.
Any source page that does not expose the complete ranking table is insufficient for exact 100 bundled rows.

validationContract.cityDataVerifier: scripts/verify-city-data.mjs must validate exactly 193 UN member-state capital markers, TOP100 exact count 100, ranks 1-100, coordinates, unique ids, HTTPS links, explicit TOP100 and UN193 capital Landmark/Food overrides, no generic runtime fallbacks, build-time failure for missing content, and dataset source metadata.
validationContract.boundaryVerifier: scripts/verify-boundary-data.mjs must validate Korea boundary sourceClassification, official 17-region contract or documented source-metadata exception, household target coverage, provenance exclusions, and no live map/API requirement.

cityContent.fallbackPolicy: Explicit city-level Landmark/Food overrides for every visible UN193 capital and every TOP100 city; missing content is a verification/build failure.
cityContent.licenseUsageNote: Short original labels only; no copied prose or imagery.
